title: dupatya albida
intro: Dupatya albida, also known as Chittagong teak, is a deciduous tree native to South Asia. The tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dupatya albida include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Dupatya albida is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including decoctions and infusions, to treat various health conditions, and its bark is also used to make medicine.
